import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Cloud, CloudRain, Sun, Wind, Droplets, Eye, Gauge } from 'lucide-react';

const WeatherApp = () => {
  const [selectedCity, setSelectedCity] = useState('London');
  const [searchInput, setSearchInput] = useState('');
  const [weatherData, setWeatherData] = useState(null);
  const [forecast, setForecast] = useState(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);

  const cities = [
    'London', 'New York', 'Tokyo', 'Paris', 'Sydney',
    'Dubai', 'Singapore', 'Toronto', 'Berlin', 'Mumbai'
  ];

  // Mock weather data generator (replaces API for demo)
  const generateMockWeather = (cityName) => {
    const weatherConditions = [
      { condition: 'Sunny', icon: 'sun', temp: 28 },
      { condition: 'Cloudy', icon: 'cloud', temp: 18 },
      { condition: 'Rainy', icon: 'rain', temp: 15 },
      { condition: 'Partly Cloudy', icon: 'partly-cloud', temp: 22 }
    ];
    
    const randomWeather = weatherConditions[Math.floor(Math.random() * weatherConditions.length)];
    const tempVariation = Math.floor(Math.random() * 10) - 5;
    const temp = randomWeather.temp + tempVariation;

    return {
      city: cityName,
      country: 'Country',
      temperature: temp,
      feelsLike: temp - 2,
      humidity: Math.floor(Math.random() * 40) + 40,
      windSpeed: Math.floor(Math.random() * 20) + 5,
      visibility: (Math.floor(Math.random() * 5) + 5).toFixed(1),
      pressure: Math.floor(Math.random() * 20) + 1010,
      condition: randomWeather.condition,
      icon: randomWeather.icon,
      description: randomWeather.condition.toLowerCase()
    };
  };

  const generateMockForecast = () => {
    const days = ['Tomorrow', 'Day 3', 'Day 4'];
    return days.map((day, index) => ({
      day,
      high: Math.floor(Math.random() * 15) + 20,
      low: Math.floor(Math.random() * 10) + 10,
      condition: ['Sunny', 'Cloudy', 'Rainy'][index % 3],
      icon: ['sun', 'cloud', 'rain'][index % 3]
    }));
  };

  const fetchWeather = async (city) => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      // Simulated API call with delay
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 600));
      const data = generateMockWeather(city);
      setWeatherData(data);
      setForecast(generateMockForecast());
    } catch (err) {
      setError('Failed to fetch weather data. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchWeather(selectedCity);
  }, [selectedCity]);

  const handleSearch = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (searchInput.trim()) {
      setSelectedCity(searchInput.trim());
      setSearchInput('');
    }
  };

  const getBackgroundStyle = () => {
    if (!weatherData) return {};
    
    const conditions = {
      'Sunny': 'linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%)',
      'Cloudy': 'linear-gradient(135deg, #4a5568 0%, #2d3748 100%)',
      'Rainy': 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1a202c 0%, #2d3748 100%)',
      'Partly Cloudy': 'linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #4a5568 100%)'
    };
    
    return { background: conditions[weatherData.condition] || conditions['Cloudy'] };
  };

  const getWeatherIcon = (condition) => {
    const iconProps = { size: 80, className: 'text-white drop-shadow-lg' };
    switch(condition) {
      case 'sun': return <Sun {...iconProps} />;
      case 'cloud': return <Cloud {...iconProps} />;
      case 'rain': return <CloudRain {...iconProps} />;
      case 'partly-cloud': return <Cloud {...iconProps} />;
      default: return <Sun {...iconProps} />;
    }
  };

  const getForecastIcon = (condition) => {
    const iconProps = { size: 32, className: 'text-white' };
    switch(condition) {
      case 'sun': return <Sun {...iconProps} />;
      case 'cloud': return <Cloud {...iconProps} />;
      case 'rain': return <CloudRain {...iconProps} />;
      default: return <Sun {...iconProps} />;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen transition-all duration-700" style={getBackgroundStyle()}>
      {/* Animated background overlay */}
      <div className="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none overflow-hidden">
        <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 w-96 h-96 bg-white opacity-10 rounded-full blur-3xl -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 animate-pulse"></div>
        <div className="absolute bottom-0 right-0 w-96 h-96 bg-white opacity-10 rounded-full blur-3xl translate-x-1/2 translate-y-1/2 animate-pulse" style={{animationDelay: '1s'}}></div>
      </div>

      <div className="relative z-10 min-h-screen flex flex-col">
        {/* Header */}
        <header className="backdrop-blur-md bg-white/10 border-b border-white/20 py-6 px-4">
          <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
            <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-white mb-6 tracking-tight">Weather</h1>
            
            {/* Search and Selection */}
            <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4">
              {/* Search Input */}
              <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex-1">
                <input
                  type="text"
                  value={searchInput}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchInput(e.target.value)}
                  placeholder="Search for a city..."
                  className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-white/20 text-white placeholder-white/60 border border-white/30 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/50 focus:border-transparent transition backdrop-blur-sm"
                />
              </form>

              {/* City Dropdown */}
              <select
                value={selectedCity}
                onChange={(e) => setSelectedCity(e.target.value)}
                className="px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-white/20 text-white border border-white/30 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/50 focus:border-transparent transition cursor-pointer backdrop-blur-sm md:w-48"
              >
                {cities.map(city => (
                  <option key={city} value={city} className="bg-gray-900 text-white">
                    {city}
                  </option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Main Content */}
        <main className="flex-1 max-w-6xl mx-auto w-full px-4 py-12">
          {error && (
            <div className="bg-red-500/20 border border-red-500/50 rounded-lg p-4 text-white mb-6 backdrop-blur-sm">
              {error}
            </div>
          )}

          {loading && (
            <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-96">
              <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-16 w-16 border-4 border-white/30 border-t-white"></div>
            </div>
          )}

          {weatherData && !loading && (
            <div className="space-y-8 animate-fade-in">
              {/* Current Weather Card */}
              <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 border border-white/20 shadow-2xl">
                <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 items-center">
                  {/* Left: Temperature & Condition */}
                  <div className="flex flex-col items-center md:items-start">
                    <h2 className="text-white/80 text-lg mb-2">{weatherData.city}</h2>
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                      <div>
                        <div className="text-7xl font-bold text-white tracking-tighter mb-2">
                          {Math.round(weatherData.temperature)}°
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-white/70 text-lg capitalize">{weatherData.condition}</p>
                        <p className="text-white/50 text-sm mt-2">Feels like {Math.round(weatherData.feelsLike)}°C</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* Right: Weather Icon */}
                  <div className="flex justify-center md:justify-end">
                    <div className="transform hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300">
                      {getWeatherIcon(weatherData.icon)}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Temperature in F */}
                <div className="mt-8 p-4 bg-white/10 rounded-lg border border-white/20">
                  <p className="text-white/60 text-sm">Temperature in Fahrenheit</p>
                  <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">
                    {Math.round((weatherData.temperature * 9/5) + 32)}°F
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Weather Details Grid */}
              <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
                {[
                  { icon: Droplets, label: 'Humidity', value: `${weatherData.humidity}%` },
                  { icon: Wind, label: 'Wind Speed', value: `${weatherData.windSpeed} km/h` },
                  { icon: Eye, label: 'Visibility', value: `${weatherData.visibility} km` },
                  { icon: Gauge, label: 'Pressure', value: `${weatherData.pressure} mb` }
                ].map((detail, idx) => (
                  <div key={idx} className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-4 border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/15 transition">
                    <detail.icon size={24} className="text-white/70 mb-2" />
                    <p className="text-white/60 text-sm mb-1">{detail.label}</p>
                    <p className="text-white text-xl font-semibold">{detail.value}</p>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              {/* 3-Day Forecast */}
              {forecast && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="text-white text-xl font-semibold mb-4">3-Day Forecast</h3>
                  <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                    {forecast.map((day, idx) => (
                      <div key={idx} className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-6 border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/15 transition text-center">
                        <p className="text-white/70 font-medium mb-4">{day.day}</p>
                        <div className="flex justify-center mb-4">
                          {getForecastIcon(day.icon)}
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-white/80 text-sm mb-3 capitalize">{day.condition}</p>
                        <div className="flex justify-center gap-4">
                          <div>
                            <p className="text-white/50 text-xs">High</p>
                            <p className="text-white font-semibold">{day.high}°C</p>
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <p className="text-white/50 text-xs">Low</p>
                            <p className="text-white font-semibold">{day.low}°C</p>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </main>

        {/* Footer */}
        <footer className="backdrop-blur-md bg-white/10 border-t border-white/20 py-6 px-4 text-center text-white/60 text-sm mt-auto">
          <p>Weather data is simulated for demo purposes. For production, integrate with OpenWeatherMap API.</p>
        </footer>
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');
        
        * {
          font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
        }

        @keyframes fade-in {
          from {
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(10px);
          }
          to {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
          }
        }

        .animate-fade-in {
          animation: fade-in 0.6s ease-out;
        }

        /* Custom scrollbar */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {
          width: 8px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
          background: transparent;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
          border-radius: 4px;
        }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
          background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
};

export default WeatherApp;
